# Shirdi Cabs N Travels

> 24x7 taxi service, Urbania rental, and Tempo Traveller booking in Shirdi, Maharashtra. Local sightseeing, airport transfers, outstation trips, and group tours across Maharashtra.

## Services
- [Shirdi Cabs](https://shirdicabs.in/#services): Sedan/SUV taxi for local sightseeing, Sai Baba darshan, airport & railway station pickup/drop, and outstation one-way & round trip travel.
- [Urbania Rental](https://shirdicabs.in/#services): Premium Urbania (up to 17 seats) for group tours, corporate travel, weddings and events.
- [Tempo Traveller](https://shirdicabs.in/#services): 12–17 seater Tempo Traveller for pilgrimage tours, school/college trips, and large group outstation travel.

## Fleet
- [Our Fleet](https://shirdicabs.in/#fleet): Overview of available Shirdi Cabs, Urbania, and Tempo Traveller vehicles.

## Routes
- [Popular Routes](https://shirdicabs.in/#routes): Mumbai–Shirdi, Pune–Shirdi, Nashik–Shirdi, Aurangabad–Shirdi taxi routes, plus Shani Shingnapur, Trimbakeshwar, Ellora Caves, and Ajanta Caves day trips.

## FAQ
- [Frequently Asked Questions](https://shirdicabs.in/#faq): Booking hours, airport pickup, outstation trips, and driver experience.

## Contact
- Phone / WhatsApp: +91 70206 63523
- Address: Hotel Ganpati Palace, Yog Marg, Shirdi, Maharashtra 423109
- Hours: Open 24x7
- [Contact & Booking](https://shirdicabs.in/#contact)
